Override.tutorial.cheftutorial.description: In this tutorial, Chef Booger will guide you through the daily tasks of a submarine chef and get you prepared for you to support your crew.
Override.tutorial.recap.hungryeuropan:
With Hunger and Thirst enabled, you slowly become hungry and thirsty over time, forcing you to eat and drink regularly. Being hungry and/or thirsty reduces your skills and can potentially kill you. Raw meat will decay over time and disappear after a while if not refrigerated Eating raw food can make you sick and infect you with parasites.
You can also gain various buffs from food; the more advanced the food the better the buffs.
Override.tutorial.recap.filthyeuropan:
With Hygiene enabled, you need to regularly urinate and defecate in a toilet. Holding it in will inflict various debuffs which can reduce your skills.
Your hygiene also degrades over time, and you need to wash yourself in water.
Override.tutorial.recap.sleepyeuropan: With Sleep enabled, you need to sleep in a bed when you feel fatigue. Not sleeping enough reduces your skill and can cause you to pass out from exhaustion.
Override.tutorial.recap.moodyeuropan:
With Stress enabled, stress will build up over time, or as a result of negative events such as taking damage in combat. Building up too much stress will reduce your skills.
You can reduce your stress by doing various activities, such as playing an instrument, drinking alcohol, reading a magazine or gambling.
